objective: Fix the path-only grove-core dependency pin in cli/Cargo.toml and document the crates.io publish order to make both workspace crates fully publishable.
key_changes: cli/Cargo.toml: changed grove-core dependency from path-only to path+version pin (=0.1.11)
scripts/bump-version.sh: added step 3/6 to update grove-core exact version pin atomically with other version bumps
scripts/bump-version.sh: renumbered old steps 3-5 to 4-6 and updated 'Done' summary line
RELEASING.md: added step 5 (cargo publish grove-core then grove) between tag and watch-build steps
RELEASING.md: added ordering constraint bullet (grove-core before grove on crates.io)
Verified: perl regex in bump-version.sh correctly rewrites =0.1.11 to =0.1.12 in spot-check
